name: 卫青
bio: 卫青，武道宗师，以夺取敌人武器为战术核心。他是战场上最令人头疼的存在，以无限连击控制战局。
bio_en: Takeda Nobutada, a martial arts master whose core tactic is stealing enemy weapons. He is the most troublesome presence on the battlefield, controlling the situation with infinite combos.
story: 卫青，武道宗师，以夺取敌人武器为战术核心。他在单人游戏中极为烦人，难以对付，可以轻松设置无限连击。他的存在让敌人时刻处于警惕之中。

skills.skill_description: 在10秒内保持警觉，当受到蓝色蓄力攻击时，取消攻击并夺取敌人武器，同时恢复少量生命值和护甲。冷却30秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Within 10s, when attacked by a Blue Focus attack, cancel it and steal the opponent's weapon, restoring some health and armor. Cooldown: 30s.

skills.skill_description: 向前冲刺，夺取敌人武器并攻击敌人，同时恢复更多生命值和护甲。冷却18秒。
skills.skill_description_en: Head forward, grab the opponent's weapon, and attack them, restoring even more health and armor. Cooldown: 18s.

skills.skill_description: 击退敌人并释放符仁持续30秒。按F攻击敌人，消耗25%怒气后恢复大量生命值和护甲。
skills.skill_description_en: Knock back enemies and cast out the Furen for 30s. Press F to attack enemies, and after consuming 25% rage, regain health and armor.

skills.skill_description: 击退敌人并释放符仁，在2秒内可将空中的敌人再次击退。
skills.skill_description_en: Knock back enemies and cast out the Furen. Within 2s, knock back airborne enemies again.
